spec_match.rationale: Accurately describes the step-by-step protocol for both the manual postMessage method and the browser-native declarative mechanism.

interactive.rationale: Provides an engaging, animated trace simulation of the multi-step layout protocols.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Perfect alignment with the visual simulation blurb in the index.

edge_cases.rationale: Explains important cross-origin edge cases like manual targetOrigin validation and JS-blocked scenarios.

references.rationale: Violates repository hard rule: does not contain a link to chromestatus.com/feature/5108373464547328.

design_system.rationale: Excellent use of styled step list indicators and timing metrics boxes conforming to the style guide.

openQuestions.title: Add ChromeStatus link (hard rule violation)
openQuestions.detail: The page does not contain a link to chromestatus.com/feature/5108373464547328, which violates the repository hard rule that every concept page must include a ChromeStatus link.
